component.name: MainScene
component.script:
function init() m.currentMode = m.top.findNode("currentMode") m.iptvPlayer = m.top.findNode("iptvPlayer") m.webBrowser = m.top.findNode("webBrowser") m.settingsPanel = m.top.findNode("settingsPanel")
m.menuGroup = m.top.findNode("menuGroup") m.iptvContainer = m.top.findNode("iptvContainer") m.browserContainer = m.top.findNode("browserContainer") m.settingsContainer = m.top.findNode("settingsContainer")
m.iptvButton = m.top.findNode("iptvButton") m.browserButton = m.top.findNode("browserButton") m.settingsButton = m.top.findNode("settingsButton")
m.iptvButton.observeField("buttonSelected", m.port) m.browserButton.observeField("buttonSelected", m.port) m.settingsButton.observeField("buttonSelected", m.port)
m.top.observeField("currentMode", m.port)
m.currentMode.value = "menu" end function
function onKeyEvent(key as String, press as Boolean) as Boolean if not press then return false
if key = "back" if m.currentMode.value <> "menu" showMenu() return true end if end if
return false end function
function showMenu() m.menuGroup.visible = true m.iptvContainer.visible = false m.browserContainer.visible = false m.settingsContainer.visible = false m.currentMode.value = "menu" end function
function showIPTV() m.menuGroup.visible = false m.iptvContainer.visible = true m.browserContainer.visible = false m.settingsContainer.visible = false m.currentMode.value = "iptv" m.iptvPlayer.setFocus(true) end function
function showBrowser() m.menuGroup.visible = false m.iptvContainer.visible = false m.browserContainer.visible = true m.settingsContainer.visible = false m.currentMode.value = "browser" m.webBrowser.setFocus(true) end function
function showSettings() m.menuGroup.visible = false m.iptvContainer.visible = false m.browserContainer.visible = false m.settingsContainer.visible = true m.currentMode.value = "settings" end function
function onPortMessage() as void msg = wait(0, m.port)
if type(msg) = "roSGNodeEvent" field = msg.getField()
if field = "buttonSelected" button = msg.getNode() if button.id = "iptvButton" showIPTV() else if button.id = "browserButton" showBrowser() else if button.id = "settingsButton" showSettings() end if end if end if end function
